title: stelis lehmanneptis
intro: Stelis lehmanneptis, also known as the 'Pitillant', is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis lehmanneptis include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Stelis lehmanneptis can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by extracting its essential oils to create a topical treatment.
